ExportQuery:
WITH THIS AS(
SELECT
   MemberId
  ,MedicareBeneficiaryID  
  ,MedicaidID  
  ,PlanID  
  ,LastName  
  ,FirstName  
  ,MiddleInitial 
  ,DateOfBirth 
  ,Gender 
  ,GapYear
  ,SourceName
  ,collect_set( --removes any dups found
           named_struct(
            "GapType", GapType
           ,"SuspectedHCC", SuspectedHCC 
           ,"HCCType", HCCType
           ,"HCCVersion", HCCVersion
           ,"EvidenceCodeValue", EvidenceCodeValue
           ,"EvidenceCodeType", EvidenceCodeType
           ,"EvidenceCodeDescription", EvidenceCodeDescription
           ,"EvidenceDateOfService", EvidenceDateOfService
           ,"EvidenceCodeResult", CAST(EvidenceCodeResult AS DECIMAL(10,4))
           ,"EvidenceIdentifier", EvidenceIdentifier
           ,"ProbabilityScore", CAST(ProbabilityScore AS DECIMAL(5,4))
		   ,"RAGain", CAST(RAGain AS DECIMAL(10,4))
           )  
   ) as memberGap 
FROM QueryResult WHERE FileLayoutDescription = "MemberRiskByCondition" 
GROUP BY
   MemberId
  ,MedicareBeneficiaryID  
  ,MedicaidID  
  ,PlanID  
  ,LastName  
  ,FirstName  
  ,MiddleInitial 
  ,DateOfBirth 
  ,Gender 
  ,GapYear
  ,SourceName
)
SELECT * 
FROM THIS
